name: twitch_scraper
title: Twitch Scraper
description: Retrieve public Twitch profiles, channel videos, schedules, and clips from Twitch's rendered pages and anonymous page data.

seo.title: Twitch Scraper API for Profiles, Videos, Schedules, and Clips
seo.description: Retrieve structured public Twitch creator profiles, channel videos, schedules, and clip metadata for agents and data workflows.
seo.intro: Twitch Scraper opens Twitch's public pages in Better Fetch's browser and normalizes the anonymous data Twitch sends to those pages. It supports creator profiles, public videos, schedules, and individual clips without requiring a private Twitch account.

useCases.title: Creator research
useCases.description: Resolve a public channel to its display name, description, avatar, follower label, and live status when exposed.

useCases.title: Video monitoring
useCases.description: Collect recent public broadcasts, highlights, and uploads from a creator page.

useCases.title: Streaming intelligence
useCases.description: Inspect scheduled streams and enrich public clip URLs with normalized metadata.

faqs.question: Does this require Twitch login?
faqs.answer: No. The implemented operations use data available to an anonymous visitor on Twitch's public web pages.

faqs.question: Does it download streams or videos?
faqs.answer: No. It returns public metadata and canonical URLs, not media files.

faqs.question: Why use a browser?
faqs.answer: Twitch loads most structured channel data after the initial HTML response, so the tool captures the public requests made by Twitch's own page.

handle.description: Public Twitch username or channel URL for profile, user_videos, and user_schedule modes.

clip_url.description: Public Twitch clip URL or clip slug for clip mode.
